'''katara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadcrew|roadcrew]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-t-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadcrew|roadcrew]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| katara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kætæræth|kætæræth]] || [[word:kætæræj|kætæræj]] || [[word:kætæræsh|kætæræsh]] || [[word:kætæræ|kætæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:katatarath|katatarath]] || [[word:katataraj|katataraj]] || [[word:katatarash|katatarash]] || [[word:katatara|katatara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:katarath|katarath]] || [[word:kataraj|kataraj]] || [[word:katarash|katarash]] || [[word:katara|katara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:katafrath|katafrath]] || [[word:katafraj|katafraj]] || [[word:katafrash|katafrash]] || [[word:katafraf|katafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kataratha|kataratha]] || [[word:kataraja|kataraja]] || [[word:katarasha|katarasha]] || [[word:kataraka|kataraka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:katarath|katarath]] || [[word:kataraj|kataraj]] || [[word:katarash|katarash]] || [[word:katara|katara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:katarathal|katarathal]] || [[word:katarajal|katarajal]] || [[word:katarashal|katarashal]] || [[word:katarakal|katarakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:katarathatha|katarathatha]] || [[word:katarajaja|katarajaja]] || [[word:katarashasha|katarashasha]] || [[word:kataraka|kataraka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:katarathan|katarathan]] || [[word:katarajan|katarajan]] || [[word:katarashan|katarashan]] || [[word:katarakan|katarakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:katarathaoro|katarathaoro]] || [[word:katarajaoro|katarajaoro]] || [[word:katarashaoro|katarashaoro]] || [[word:katarakaoro|katarakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
